ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on May 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
